_meta.description: Forbidden overclaim map for Noesis. Status X — must never be emitted as valid output. docs/OVERCLAIM_GUARDRAILS.md is generated from this file. Enforced at runtime by noesis/forbidden.py (gate12_forbidden) and audited by the bibliography validator (Gate 4).

forbidden_claims.why_forbidden: Noesis is a bounded, human-in-the-loop metacognition tool with no general autonomy.
forbidden_claims.safe_replacement: Noesis is a deterministic + LLM-assisted metacognition tool.
forbidden_claims.probe: this tool is artificial general intelligence

forbidden_claims.why_forbidden: No method here measures or detects subjective experience.
forbidden_claims.safe_replacement: Noesis uses consciousness-theory vocabulary only as structural analogy.

forbidden_claims.why_forbidden: The repo Φ-proxy is a structural heuristic; IIT Φ concerns experience and is not implemented.
forbidden_claims.safe_replacement: A Φ-named proxy summarizes integration structure, not experience.

forbidden_claims.claim: The GNWT analogy proves a biological workspace.
forbidden_claims.why_forbidden: Broadcast/re-entry is a software analogy, not evidence about brains.
forbidden_claims.safe_replacement: GNWT-inspired broadcast is an engineering analogy (S4).

forbidden_claims.why_forbidden: The loop is closed through a human; there is no autonomous perception-action cycle.
It is a throughput proxy over validation events, not a neural measurement.
forbidden_claims.safe_replacement: IEV bandwidth is an operational proxy for validation throughput.

forbidden_claims.claim: The LLM judge is final truth.
forbidden_claims.why_forbidden: LLM-as-judge is biased and unreliable for high-stakes adjudication.
forbidden_claims.safe_replacement: The judge is one fallible signal; high-stakes cases route to human review.

forbidden_claims.why_forbidden: Noesis is not a clinical instrument and provides no treatment.
forbidden_claims.safe_replacement: Noesis is a thinking tool, not therapy.

forbidden_claims.why_forbidden: No diagnostic capability exists; diagnosis requires a qualified clinician.
forbidden_claims.safe_replacement: Noesis describes intent structure; it does not diagnose.

forbidden_claims.why_forbidden: EIIC is a speculative (S6) construct with no predictive validation.
forbidden_claims.safe_replacement: EIIC is a speculative trajectory construct, not a prediction of destiny.

forbidden_claims.claim: The entropy proxy is physical entropy.
forbidden_claims.why_forbidden: It is an information-structural proxy over candidate sets, not thermodynamic entropy.
forbidden_claims.safe_replacement: Delegated computational entropy is an information-structural proxy.

forbidden_claims.claim: Cognitive dimensionality is measured brain dimensionality.
forbidden_claims.why_forbidden: It is a statistical proxy over candidate representations, not a neural measurement.
forbidden_claims.safe_replacement: Cognitive dimensionality is an effective-dimensionality proxy.
